commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Telegram pre-sequential callback acknowledgement path for selected final-button payloads, sends mapped visible acknowledgement messages after callback authorization/plugin dispatch, extends Telegram callback tests, and updates one raw-fetch allowlist line.

PR surface: Source +56, Tests +217, Other 0. Total +273 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live repro was established in this review. Source inspection shows the current main callback answer path sits behind the Telegram sequentializer, which explains the reported delayed acknowledgement behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainer review is needed to choose the permanent Telegram callback contract and to trigger current-head Telegram Desktop proof; that is not a safe automated repair lane.
